_authoring_notes: Phase 4a-hub Section 4 — Alliance FOUNDATION STRIP. Sits BELOW the 6-specialty-tile grid.

Architecture: makes the hierarchy literal. The 6 specialty tiles above are the standing structures (top billing — they're the destination). Alliance sits as the foundation underneath them. Reader doesn't need to be told the relationship; the layout shows it.

Color logo (ID 5136) on white card in offwhite section — same palette as specialty tiles, gold top accent (4px) marks Alliance as featured/distinct.
Visually distinct from specialty grid via section-level padding and the 'foundation' framing eyebrow.

The Foundation

Five Star Alliance

The universal membership underneath every specialty above. Alliance is the entry point for every practitioner in this association: events, media, education, and the broader FSI professional network across all four communities.
